findings.issue: Architecture subsection '### How it works' still does not match the exact template heading. The spec now has '### How it works — modified components' and '### How it works — data flow' as two separate subsections (plus '### procpidstat interval calculation in recorder' as a fourth standalone subsection). The template requires a single '### How it works' heading. The major issue (complete absence of the required prefix) is resolved; the remaining deviation is a naming variant.
findings.fix: Merge '### How it works — modified components', '### How it works — data flow', and '### procpidstat interval calculation in recorder' under a single '### How it works' heading (with internal subheadings as prose or bold labels if needed). This removes the fourth standalone subsection and satisfies the template exactly.

findings.issue: Decision 4 ('SysInfo struct in stat package') still has no 'Alternatives considered' subsection. The template requires every decision to include Decision + Rationale + Alternatives considered.
findings.fix: Add 'Alternatives considered' to Decision 4. Example: 'Define SysInfo in record package: rejected — would require report to import record, creating a cross-package dependency; stat is the natural owner as it defines ProcPidStat and ProcPidIO.'

findings.issue: Decision 7 ('procpidstat describe text') still has no 'Rationale' and no 'Alternatives considered' subsections. A bare configuration value without tradeoffs is not a decision per the template.
findings.fix: Either add Rationale + Alternatives considered (e.g., 'Rationale: wording matches the TUI column label style. Alternatives: shorter
— rejected for ambiguity.') or remove Decision 7 from the Decisions section and place the describe string as an inline note in the Architecture or Data Models section.

findings.issue: Task 04 uses skill 'code-writing' but lists only two reviewers ('dev-code-reviewer', 'dev-test-reviewer'). The default reviewer set for code-writing is dev-code-reviewer + dev-security-auditor + dev-test-reviewer. 'dev-security-auditor' is missing.
findings.fix: Add 'dev-security-auditor' to Task 04 Reviewers, or explicitly note why security review is not needed for a test-only task.

findings.issue: Project Knowledge files (architecture.md, patterns.md) do not exist at '.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/'. Standards compliance check (directory structure, naming conventions) could not be performed.
findings.fix: Create architecture.md and patterns.md in '.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/' using the documentation-writing skill, or verify the correct path if files exist elsewhere.

summary: Round 2 re-validation: all three major findings from round 1 are resolved. Task 02 description is now 4 sentences (was 6, limit is 5). Task 02 'Files to read' no longer contains line number references. Architecture section now uses 'What we're building/modifying' and 'How it works' prefixes. Remaining open items: (1) '### How it works' is split into two subsections with suffixes plus a fourth standalone subsection — minor heading deviation; (2) Decisions 4 and 7 still lack required 'Alternatives considered' / 'Rationale' subsections — both minors carried from round 1; (3) Task 04 is missing 'dev-security-auditor' from its code-writing reviewer set — new minor; (4) Project Knowledge reference files absent — minor carried from round 1. Zero critical findings. Status: approved.
